description: SYN flood already mitigated by shield (xdp + cloudflare). The scenario seeds a pre-built shield incident because reproducing a 10k pps flood on the CI runner would require a packet generator. Stub AI returns Ignore (shield already mitigated; the agent's job is to acknowledge, not re-block). Target envelope per spec 024: 1 incident, blocks=0 (upstream mitigation is what handled the attack), telegram=0 (PR #1020 / spec 078 P0: Ignore/Dismiss are non-actions and no longer push a 'Threat neutralized' action report; the acknowledgement lives in the dashboard + daily digest, not a push). The scenario guards against accidental double-blocking regressions in the shield path.
